blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
